name: Hot Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine refried beans, salsa sauce, sour cream, and dried onion flakes in a 1-1/2 or 2 quart microwave-safe bowl.
2. Cook on MEDIUM for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring the mixture every 2 minutes and turning the bowl occasionally.
3. Stir in cayenne pepper and sprinkle with shredded cheese.
4. Return to the microwave and cook on MEDIUM for an additional 1 to 2 minutes or until the cheese is melted and hot.
One Serving: Calories: 33 (spread only) Carbohydrates: 5 (spread only)
Exchange: 1/2 bread (spread only) Source: Diabetic Microwave Cookbook, by Mary Jane Finsand, ISBN 0-8069-6957-1.
